title: pavonia dentata
intro: Pavonia dentata, also known as the Mexican Rose Mallow or Four-Leaf Pavonia, is a flowering plant species in the hibiscus family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Pavonia dentata include its potential to treat various conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues. Pavonia dentata can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote healing and well-being.
